title: Smart Data Models - OpenStreetMap / OSMAerialway
description: An aerial transport or lift from OpenStreetMap tagged with aerialway=*. Describes cable cars, gondolas, chair lifts, and drag lifts

type.description: Property. NGSI Entity type. It has to be OSMAerialway

osmId.description: Property. The original OpenStreetMap element integer identifier

osmType.description: Property. The type of the original OSM element

osmLastModified.description: Property. Timestamp of the last modification

aerialwayType.description: Property. The OSM aerialway tag classifying the lift or transport type. Enum:'cable_car, gondola, chair_lift, drag_lift, t-bar, rope_tow, magic_carpet, zip_line, goods, pylon, station...'. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:aerialway'

capacity.description: Property. Total capacity of the line in persons per hour. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:capacity'

occupancy.description: Property. Passengers per cabin or chair. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:aerialway:occupancy'

heating.description: Property. Indicates if the chairs or cabins are heated. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:aerialway:heating'

bubble.description: Property. Indicates if chair lifts have a bubble cover. Model:'https://wiki.openstreetmap.org/wiki/Key:aerialway:bubble'

elevationGain.description: Property. Vertical elevation gain of the aerialway in metres

seeAlso.description: Property. List of URIs pointing to additional resources
